Metadata.Model: Autonomous Multiclass TRM — m3+m4 Unified Moving Bottleneck Extension
Metadata.Description: High-fidelity benchmark dataset for stiff ODE resolution, 4-phase operator splitting, multiclass shockwave simulation, and isomorphic moving bottleneck capture/release dynamics.

Class_Definitions.Class_A_m0: Trucks (heavy vehicles with free-flow speed cap v_A_ff)
Class_Definitions.Class_Bs_m2: B-slow: Passenger cars strictly trapped behind moving truck bottleneck

Spatiotemporal_Discretization_Domain.Description: Eulerian FVM grid parameters satisfying the explicit Phase 4 CFL stability constraint.

Macroscopic_Capacity_and_Filter_Paramete.Description: Constants regulating effective spatial boundaries, regularizers, and continuous exponential relaxation filters.

Heterogeneous_Kinematic_Class_Profiles.Description: Parameters for Class A (Trucks), Class Bf (Free Cars), Class Bs (Trapped Cars). Bf and Bs share the same PCE weight w=1.0.

Class_A_Truck.Note: v[6]=14.0 m/s is the truck free-flow cap. lambda_acc^(Bs)=0 for i>=i_thr.

Class_Bs_Trapped_Car.Constraints: lambda_acc^(Bs)=0 for i>=i_thr (Acceleration Blockade). gamma^(Bs)=0 all lanes (Absolute Lateral Immobilization).

Kinetic_Collision_Kernel_Matrix_Beta.Description: 3x3 matrix beta^{(m,n)}. Row=trailing class m, Column=blocking class n. Unit: m^-1. Interaction term uses w^(n)*f_k^(n)/rho_max normalization.

Moving_Bottleneck_Reaction_Parameters.Description: New parameters governing the Capture (Bf->Bs) and Release (Bs->Bf) reactions introduced in the m3+m4 extension.

Operator_Splitting_Sequence.Description: 4-phase Lie-Trotter splitting. Order is critical to prevent ghost penetration.
Operator_Splitting_Sequence.Phase_1: Capture & Release (sigma, mu) — Exact Analytical Matrix Exponential. phi(z)=(1-e^{-z})/z safe at z->0.
Operator_Splitting_Sequence.Phase_2: Internal Speed Changes (lambda) — Dynamic Algebraic Projection for Bs + Semi-implicit Thomas Algorithm.
Operator_Splitting_Sequence.Phase_3: Lateral Lane-Changing (gamma) — Explicit Euler. gamma^(Bs)=0 enforced.
Operator_Splitting_Sequence.Phase_4: Spatial Advection (Phi) — Explicit Euler + Global Godunov Flux Limiter alpha.

Lateral_Topology_Edges.Inner_Bound: gamma_{1->0} = 0. Escape gate G_{1->0} = 1 (boundary = fully blocked).

Numerical_Validation_Scenario_Extreme_St.Description: Pathological initialization to validate Phase 1 exact exponential, Phase 2 Thomas stability, and Phase 4 Godunov limiter under extreme stiffness.

Downstream_Bottleneck_Zone_Cells_75_to_8.Description: Near-capacity jam of Class A trucks at minimum speed.

Upstream_High_Speed_Injection_Zone_Cells.Description: Dense platoon of Class Bf free cars at maximum speed approaching bottleneck.
Upstream_High_Speed_Injection_Zone_Cells.Condition: Expected to trigger Phase 1 capture upon hitting bottleneck, validating moving bottleneck entrapment.
